description: This established vending machine route in Orlando, FL consists of 25 machines placed in high-traffic locations such as offices, schools, and gyms. The business generates an annual gross revenue of $40,000 with a cash flow of $18,000 after expenses. Machines are well-maintained, and locations have long-term agreements. The current owner operates part-time, spending approximately 10-15 hours per week restocking and maintaining the machines. All equipment is included in the sale, valued at approximately $20,000. Training will be provided to the new owner for a smooth transition. This is a turnkey opportunity with consistent income.
seller_motivation: Owner is retiring after 13 years in the business and looking to relocate out of state.

business_name: Small Vending Route in Suburban Area
description: For sale is a small vending route with 18 machines located in suburban Columbus, OH. The business brings in $30,000 in gross revenue annually with a net cash flow of $12,000. Machines are placed in stable locations including small businesses and community centers. The owner spends about 8-10 hours per week managing inventory and maintenance. All machines are in good working condition, and the sale includes a small inventory of products. This is a great opportunity for someone looking for a flexible, low-overhead business with room to expand by adding more machines.
seller_motivation: Seller is a baby boomer retiring after many years of running this side business and wishes to spend more time with family.

description: This turnkey vending business in San Antonio, TX includes 30 vending machines in prime locations such as shopping centers, offices, and schools. The business generates $45,000 in annual gross revenue with a cash flow of $20,000 after expenses. The owner works part-time, dedicating about 12 hours per week to restocking and minor repairs. All machines are modern with card readers installed, and the sale includes a small delivery vehicle valued at $5,000. The business has a solid reputation with location managers, ensuring long-term placement agreements. Ideal for a new owner looking for a scalable, cash-flowing business.
seller_motivation: Owner is retiring due to age and health concerns, seeking to pass on this profitable operation to a motivated buyer.

description: This compact vending route in Raleigh, NC includes 15 machines in secure, high-traffic locations such as offices and warehouses. The business generates $25,000 in annual gross revenue with a net cash flow of $10,000. The owner spends approximately 5-7 hours per week on operations, making it an ideal side business. All equipment is included, with machines averaging 5 years old and in good condition. The seller is willing to train the buyer for up to 2 weeks to ensure a seamless handover. This is a low-cost entry into the vending industry with potential for growth by adding more locations.
seller_motivation: Owner is a baby boomer retiring after nearly 20 years in the business and looking to downsize their workload.

description: Profitable vending machine route for sale in Phoenix, AZ.
